ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

We would like to inform you that the corporate VPN will undergo a scheduled maintenance on **Friday, 17th May 2026** between **10:00 PM and 2:00 AM IST**.

During this window the VPN service will be temporarily unavailable. Please ensure that you disconnect from the VPN before 9:45 PM to avoid any interruptions. If you have any critical tasks that require VPN access, plan them accordingly.

After the maintenance window, the VPN will automatically reconnect. If you experience any issues, please reach out to the IT helpdesk at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Verify Your Income Tax Refund – ₹1.2 Cr pending
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has processed a refund of **₹1,20,00,000** for the FY 2025-26. However, due to recent updates in the tax regulations, we need you to verify your account details before the refund can be released.

Please click on the link below to confirm your bank account and identity details:

<URL>

If you do not complete this verification within **48 hours**, your refund will be withheld, and you may face penalties for non-compliance with the Income Tax Act.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
Tax Verification Team
